201200:
## Read
He finally delivered in the knockout rounds. After finding the net in the Group Stage, Cristiano Ronaldo scored his first goal in World Cup knockout play: he equalized from the penalty spot in the 2-1 comeback win over Croatia that put Portugal into the Round of 16. The captain keeps the Portuguese dream alive.
## Performance
He drew a blank in the opener (1-1 with DR Congo), scored twice in the 5-0 rout of Uzbekistan (6' and 39'), and was held in the 0-0 with Colombia. In the Round of 32, against Croatia, he equalized from the penalty spot in the 68th minute — his first goal in World Cup knockout play — and Gonçalo Ramos completed the comeback in stoppage time (90+4').
## Numbers
4 matches · 3 goals · 0 cards · Portugal through to the Round of 16, where it faces Spain. Ronaldo came alive in the knockout rounds at just the right time.
228912:
## Read
An early exit for the veteran. Manuel Neuer could not prevent the fall in the Round of 32: Germany drew 1-1 with Paraguay and was eliminated on penalties. At 40, the German icon says goodbye to the World Cup after a cruel knockout tie for the Mannschaft.
## Performance
He carried Germany to the Round of 32 as winners of Group E, even though he was breached in every Group Stage match. Against Paraguay, he conceded Julio Enciso's goal in the 42nd minute; Kai Havertz equalized in the 54th, and the 1-1 held through extra time. In the shootout, however, Paraguayan goalkeeper Orlando Gill shone, and Germany fell 4-3, eliminated.
## Numbers
4 matches · 5 goals conceded at the World Cup · eliminated in the Round of 32. Germany finished 1st in Group E but was stopped by Paraguay on penalties (1-1 in regulation, 4-3 in the shootout). End of the campaign.
229397:
## Read
Messi remains unstoppable and the World Cup's outright top scorer. After closing the Group Stage with 6 goals, the captain opened the scoring in the Round of 32 and reached 7 — Argentina advances to the Round of 16 as an increasingly clear title favorite, with a showdown against Salah's Egypt ahead.
## Performance
A hat-trick in the opener (3-0 over Algeria, in the 17th, 60th, and 76th), two against Austria (2-0, in the 38th and 90+5'), and the goal that sealed the 3-1 win over Jordan (in the 80th, after coming on in the second half). In the Round of 32, he scored in the 29th minute to open the very tough 3-2 win over Cape Verde — which was forced to extra time (2-2 with Sidny Lopes Cabral in the 103rd) until a Diney Borges own goal in the 111th stamped the ticket.
## Numbers
4 matches · 7 goals · 0 cards · outright top scorer of the World Cup. Argentina won Group J with 9 points (100%, goal difference +7) and came through the Round of 32; in the Round of 16 it faces Egypt.
241559:
## Read
End of the road at the World Cup. At 39, Luka Modrić ran the Croatian midfield to the very end, but watched Croatia lose 2-1 in a comeback to Portugal in the Round of 32 and bow out of the World Cup. Likely the maestro's last World Cup appearance, ended with his head held high.
## Performance
He was Croatia's metronome in the Group Stage, securing 2nd place in Group L. In the Round of 32, against Portugal, he kept orchestrating and picked up a yellow card in the 59th minute. Ivan Perisic even opened the scoring (53'), but Cristiano Ronaldo equalized from the penalty spot (68') and Gonçalo Ramos sealed the elimination in stoppage time (90+4').
## Numbers
4 matches · 0 goals · 1 yellow card · Croatia eliminated in the Round of 32 (having finished 2nd in Group L). The end of an era for Modrić's generation.
269058:
## Read
Captain and number 10, James Rodríguez is once again Colombia's maestro: the organizer who dictates the tempo and the main technical reference of a side that won Group K with authority. More than a decade after his 2014 Golden Boot, he remains the creative baton the Colombians look for in every buildup.
## Performance
A starter in all four matches, he was the brains of the buildup and came off to save his legs in every one: substituted in the 72nd in the 3-1 win over Uzbekistan, in the 58th in the 1-0 over DR Congo and in the 76th in the 0-0 with Portugal that stamped the group lead. In the Round of 32, he started the 1-0 triumph over Ghana — a goal from Jhon Arias in the 14th — before giving way to Richard Ríos. Still without scoring in the competition, he is the guiding thread of a team that conceded only one goal in the entire Group Stage.
## Numbers
4 GP · 0 goals · 0 cards · Group K leaders (7 pts), qualified for the Round of 16.
308370:
## Read
Safety between the posts on the road to the Round of 16. Alisson was beaten once but watched Brazil rally to beat Japan 2-1 in the Round of 32. The goalkeeper remains the insurance policy of a side that advanced in the knockout rounds.
## Performance
He closed the Group Stage with two clean sheets and top spot in Group C. In the Round of 32, he was beaten by Kaishu Sano in the 29th against Japan, but Brazil turned it around through Casemiro (56') and Gabriel Martinelli (90+5'), securing a place in the Round of 16. No cards.
## Numbers
4 matches · 2 goals conceded at the World Cup · through to the Round of 16. Brazil, 1st in Group C, beat Japan 2-1 in the Round of 32.
308386:
## Read
Leadership and a goal at just the right time. Casemiro left his mark in the knockout rounds: he scored the equalizer in the 2-1 comeback win over Japan that carried Brazil into the Round of 16. At 34, the midfielder answered when the balance mattered most.
## Performance
In the Group Stage he featured in the draw with Morocco (yellow card in the 37th) and the win over Scotland. Against Japan, he picked up an early yellow (14') but was a protagonist: with Brazil trailing after Sano's goal (29'), he leveled in the 56th minute. Martinelli made it two in stoppage time (90+5') and Casemiro walked off to applause in the 90+1'.
## Numbers
4 matches · 1 goal · 2 yellows · through to the Round of 16. Brazil beat Japan 2-1 in the Round of 32, with a goal from the midfielder.
344654:
## Read
Salah is Egypt's beacon and keeps carrying the Pharaohs forward: after securing qualification in the Group Stage, he was one of the takers in the penalty shootout that eliminated Australia and put Egypt into the Round of 16 — where he meets Messi's Argentina again.
## Performance
Quiet in the 1-1 with Belgium (substituted in the 76th), he made the difference against New Zealand with a goal in the 67th in a 3-1 comeback win, and in the 1-1 with Iran the draw was enough to qualify. In the Round of 32, the 1-1 with Australia (Emam Ashour in the 13th; a Mohamed Hany own goal in the 55th) went to penalties, and Salah converted his kick in the 4-2 win that earned the place.
## Numbers
4 matches · 1 goal (plus a penalty converted in the shootout) · 0 cards. Egypt came through 2nd in Group G (5 points, goal difference +2) and eliminated Australia on penalties; in the Round of 16 it faces Argentina.
358120:
## Read
He came off before the epic comeback. Kevin De Bruyne started the Round of 32 against Senegal but was substituted in the 56th minute, with Belgium trailing 2-0 — and watched from the bench as the Red Devils mounted a dramatic rally to win 3-2 in extra time and advance to the Round of 16.
## Performance
A starter and decisive in the Group Stage, with a goal in the 5-1 rout of New Zealand that gave Belgium top spot in Group G. In the Round of 32, he started against Senegal but left the field in the 56th minute (Raskin came on) with Belgium trailing 2-0 — Habib Diarra (24') and Ismaila Sarr (51') had scored. The comeback would come later, through Lukaku (86') and Tielemans (89' and 120+5').
## Numbers
4 matches · 1 goal · 0 cards · Belgium through to the Round of 16, where it faces the United States. De Bruyne came off before the comeback, but the team advanced.
364752:
## Read
At 40, Josimar Dias — Vozinha — finished as the symbol of Cape Verde's most historic campaign: the nation's debut in the Round of 32 of a World Cup. The wall only fell against Argentina, and even then only after taking the favorites to extra time.
## Performance
He was giant in the Group Stage: seven saves and a 0-0 with a man-of-the-match award against Spain, the 2-2 with Uruguay, and the 0-0 with Saudi Arabia that sealed the unprecedented qualification. In the Round of 32, he was beaten 3-2 by Messi's Argentina (who opened the scoring in the 29th) in a battle that went to extra time — Cape Verde were level at 2-2 until a Diney Borges own goal in the 111th sealed the elimination.
## Numbers
4 matches · 2 clean sheets · 5 goals conceded · Cape Verde fell in the Round of 32 against Argentina, ending the best campaign in its history.
369419:
## Read
The captain delivered again. Harry Kane scored both goals in the 2-1 comeback win over DR Congo in the Round of 32 and carried England into the Round of 16. Always him in the decisive moments for the English Team.
## Performance
He scored twice against Croatia in the opener (4-2), was held in the 0-0 with Ghana, and scored in the 2-0 win over Panama. In the Round of 32, England fell behind — Brian Cipenga made it 1-0 for DR Congo in the 7th — but Kane showed up late with a brace (75' and 86') to complete the comeback.
## Numbers
4 matches · 5 goals · 0 cards · England through to the Round of 16, where it faces Mexico. Kane reached five goals at the World Cup, decisive once again.
389867:
## Read
The French beacon does not dim. Kylian Mbappé scored the winner in the 1-0 victory over Paraguay in the Round of 16 and carried France into the Quarterfinals. Captain and top scorer, the number 10 reached seven goals at the World Cup and remains decisive in the moments that matter.
## Performance
He scored four goals in the Group Stage (two against Senegal, two against Iraq) and led France's 100% record in Group I. In the Round of 32, he scored twice in the 3-0 rout of Sweden (45' and 74'). In the Round of 16, against a very compact Paraguay, he broke the resistance in the 70th minute — his seventh goal at the World Cup — and secured French qualification.
## Numbers
5 matches · 7 goals · 0 cards · France through to the Quarterfinals, where it faces Morocco. Mbappé remains the top scorer and the leading name in the attack of one of the title favorites.
390650:
## Read
Eloy Room owns the number 1 shirt and is the great hero of Curaçao's unprecedented World Cup story. At 37, the goalkeeper wrote himself into the books with a monumental display against Ecuador. The campaign ended in the Group Stage, but Room's mark endured.
## Performance
The debut was harsh — 7-1 to Germany. But the response was one for the history books: in the 0-0 with Ecuador, he made 15 saves, the most ever recorded in 90 minutes of a World Cup (since 1966), earning Curaçao's first point at a World Cup. In the finale, he conceded the 2-0 to Ivory Coast, and Curaçao bowed out at the bottom of Group E. He played all 270 minutes of the Group Stage.
## Numbers
3 matches · 1 historic clean sheet · 15 saves in the 0-0 with Ecuador (a record for 90 minutes of a World Cup) · 9 goals conceded · 1 point. Curaçao finished 4th in Group E, eliminated — but Room became the symbol of a campaign that is already historic.
402261:
## Read
The hero of qualification could not prevent the fall. Nicolas Pépé, decisive in Ivory Coast's qualification, started in the Round of 32 elimination to Norway (2-1). Ivory Coast bows out of the World Cup after a strong Group Stage.
## Performance
After the decisive brace over Curaçao that qualified the team, Pépé started against Norway and came off in the 87th minute without scoring. Antonio Nusa opened for the Norwegians (39'), Amad Diallo equalized (74'), but Erling Haaland scored the winner in the 86th, eliminating the Ivorians.
## Numbers
4 matches · 2 goals · 1 yellow · eliminated in the Round of 32. Ivory Coast, 2nd in Group E, lost 2-1 to Norway.
404353:
## Read
The speed weapon bows out without shining in the knockout rounds. Leroy Sané started in Germany's Round of 32 elimination to Paraguay — a 1-1 and a fall on penalties — ending a World Cup below expectations for the winger.
## Performance
He had a modest Group Stage, with only the goal against Ecuador (in the 2-1 defeat) and top spot in Group E secured. In the Round of 32, he started against Paraguay and came off in the 88th minute without finding the net; Enciso (42') and Havertz (54') scored in the 1-1, and Germany was eliminated on penalties (4-3).
## Numbers
4 matches · 1 goal · 0 cards · eliminated in the Round of 32 with Germany, beaten by Paraguay on penalties.
405742:
## Read
No goals, but into the Round of 16. Vinícius Júnior didn't score in the 2-1 win over Japan, but he watched Brazil punch its ticket to the knockout rounds. Brazil's top scorer in the Group Stage with 4 goals, the forward remains the attacking reference heading into the Round of 16.
## Performance
He shone in the Group Stage, with goals against Morocco, Haiti and two against Scotland (4 in total). In the Round of 32 against Japan, a starter, he was held scoreless, but Brazil came from behind through Casemiro (56') and Martinelli (90+5') after Sano's goal (29'). No cards.
## Numbers
4 GP · 4 goals · 0 cards · Brazil's top scorer. The Seleção, 1st in Group C, beat Japan 2-1 in the Round of 32 and are in the Round of 16.
419100:
## Read
Maximiliano Araújo was the main attacking weapon of Bielsa's Uruguay and finished as La Celeste's top scorer at the World Cup, with 2 goals. A speedy left winger from Sporting, the number 20 gave depth to an attack that, in the end, wasn't enough: Uruguay went out in the Group Stage.
## Performance
He opened his account in the opener, in the 1-1 draw with Saudi Arabia (80'), and repeated it against Cape Verde, scoring in the 44th minute in the 2-2 draw. In the decider against Spain, he started but couldn't break through the Spanish block in the 1-0 loss that eliminated La Celeste. No cards in the three matches.
## Numbers
3 GP · 2 goals · 0 cards · Uruguay's top scorer at the World Cup. La Celeste finished 3rd in Group H, with 2 points, eliminated — and Araújo was the sharpest name in an attack that lacked finishing.
419652:
## Read
Rested and decisive. Given a breather in the final Group Stage round, Erling Haaland came back with everything in the Round of 32: he scored the goal in the 2-1 win over Ivory Coast and carried Norway into the Round of 16. Now with 5 goals, he is the World Cup's second-leading scorer.
## Performance
He scored four goals in the first two rounds (two against Iraq, two against Senegal) and was rested in the loss to France. In the knockout rounds, he was decisive: with the game level 1-1 against Ivory Coast — Nusa (39') and Amad Diallo (74') — Haaland scored the qualifying goal in the 86th minute, securing the 2-1 win.
## Numbers
4 GP · 5 goals · 0 cards · the World Cup's second-leading scorer, behind only Messi (6). Norway beat Ivory Coast 2-1 and advanced to the Round of 16.
424051:
## Read
A bitter elimination for the Dutch reference man. Brian Brobbey started in the Round of 32, but the Netherlands drew 1-1 with Morocco and went out on penalties. The scorer of 3 goals in the Group Stage, the center forward says goodbye to the World Cup.
## Performance
Decisive in the first round (two goals against Sweden and one against Tunisia, 3 in total), he started against Morocco and came off in the 71st minute for Weghorst. Cody Gakpo opened the scoring in the 72nd, but Issa Diop equalized in stoppage time (90+1') and the match went to a penalty shootout, where the Netherlands were eliminated.
## Numbers
4 GP · 3 goals · 0 cards · eliminated in the Round of 32. The Netherlands, 1st in Group F, fell to Morocco on penalties (1-1 in regulation).
430413:
## Read
End of the line for the Samurai Blue. Ayase Ueda, Japan's goal man, watched his side take the lead but lose 2-1 from a comeback against Brazil in the Round of 32. With 2 goals at the World Cup, the forward bows out of a consistent campaign.
## Performance
He scored twice against Tunisia in the Group Stage (4-0) and helped Japan advance as runners-up in Group F. Against Brazil, Japan opened the scoring through Kaishu Sano (29'), but conceded the comeback from Casemiro (56') and Gabriel Martinelli (90+5'). Ueda didn't score, and the Japanese said goodbye.
## Numbers
4 GP · 2 goals · 0 cards · eliminated in the Round of 32. Japan lost 2-1 from a comeback against Brazil.
430609:
## Read
Fewer minutes, but a spot in the Round of 16. Matheus Cunha started in the Round of 32 and came off in the second half of the 2-1 comeback win over Japan. A Group Stage breakout with 3 goals, the forward remains in the Brazilian squad heading into the knockout rounds.
## Performance
He grew into the Group Stage, with two goals against Haiti and one against Scotland (3 in total). Against Japan, he started and was replaced by Martinelli in the 65th minute — the very scorer of the winning goal (90+5'), after Sano opened the scoring (29') and Casemiro equalized (56'). Without scoring, but with his place secured.
## Numbers
4 GP · 3 goals · 0 cards · qualified for the Round of 16. Brazil beat Japan 2-1 in the Round of 32.
441257:
## Read
The host's dream is over. Canada was eliminated in the Round of 16, beaten 3-0 by Morocco, and Jonathan David — the team's top scorer in the Group Stage with 3 goals — couldn't add to his tally in the knockout rounds. He ends the World Cup as the leading attacking name of a historic campaign for the home nation.
## Performance
He shone in the Group Stage with a hat trick against Qatar (6-0). In the Round of 32, Canada beat South Africa 1-0 with a goal from Stephen Eustáquio in the 90+2, without David scoring. In the Round of 16, they ran into a dominant Morocco: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice (50' and 82') and Soufiane Rahimi rounded off the 3-0 in stoppage time. David picked up a yellow card in the 43rd and, like the entire Canadian attack, couldn't find the goal.
## Numbers
5 GP · 3 goals · 1 yellow card · eliminated in the Round of 16. Canada, runners-up in Group B, fell to Morocco 3-0.
447860:
## Read
Back in the rotation in the knockout rounds. Álex Baena started in the Round of 32, but this time without repeating his decisive Group Stage goal: Spain didn't need him to rout Austria 3-0 and advance to the Round of 16 with authority.
## Performance
A Group Stage hero, with the goal in the 1-0 win over Uruguay that sealed the top of Group H. In the Round of 32, he started against Austria and came off in the 71st (Ferran Torres came on), without scoring — Mikel Oyarzabal (twice) and Pedro Porro settled the 3-0.
## Numbers
4 GP · 1 goal · 1 yellow card · Spain qualified for the Round of 16, where they face Portugal. Baena remained in La Roja's rotation, now without finding the net.
448355:
## Read
He stayed on the field into the extra time of the comeback. Leandro Trossard started in the Round of 32 against Senegal and played until the 109th minute, when Belgium was still chasing the improbable — and pulled it off: they won 3-2 in extra time and advanced to the Round of 16.
## Performance
He exploded in the Group Stage with two goals against New Zealand, which gave them the top of Group G. In the Round of 32, he started against Senegal and came off in the 109th (Onana came on), without scoring in a dramatic match: Belgium came back from 0-2 down (Diarra 24', Sarr 51') to win with Lukaku (86') and Tielemans (89' and 120+5').
## Numbers
4 GP · 2 goals · 0 cards · Belgium qualified for the Round of 16, where they face the United States. Trossard remained a starter in the knockout-round campaign.
484320:
## Read
He remained a starter heading into the Round of 16. Lamine Yamal took the field in the Round of 32 and played until the 85th in the 3-0 rout over Austria, which qualified Spain with authority. Without scoring this time, but a fixed piece of La Roja in the knockout rounds.
## Performance
He broke through in the Group Stage with his first goal at a World Cup, in the 4-0 rout of Saudi Arabia, and helped Spain lead Group H. In the Round of 32, he started against Austria and came off in the 85th (Gavi came on), without finding the net — Mikel Oyarzabal (twice) and Pedro Porro made it 3-0.
## Numbers
4 GP · 1 goal · 0 cards · Spain qualified for the Round of 16, where they face Portugal. Yamal remains a starter as the Spanish star in the knockout rounds.
484851:
## Read
The Group Stage hero couldn't work his magic again in the knockout rounds. Deniz Undav, the scorer of 3 goals coming off the bench in the first round, started in the Round of 32, but Germany fell to Paraguay on penalties and bowed out of the World Cup.
## Performance
Decisive in the Group Stage (a goal against Curaçao and the comeback over Ivory Coast, always coming off the bench), he started against Paraguay and was substituted in the 63rd minute by Musiala. He didn't score, and the 1-1 — Enciso (42') and Havertz (54') — went to a penalty shootout, where Germany lost 4-3.
## Numbers
4 GP · 3 goals · 0 cards · eliminated in the Round of 32. Germany, Group E leaders, fell to Paraguay on penalties.
494531:
## Read
The fairy-tale campaign ended in the Round of 16. After becoming a national hero by eliminating Germany on penalties, Orlando Gill couldn't hold off France: Paraguay lost 1-0, with a goal from Mbappé, and said goodbye to the World Cup. Even so, the goalkeeper leaves the tournament with his stature enhanced.
## Performance
He was decisive in the Round of 32: in the 1-1 draw with Germany, he saved two spot kicks in the penalty shootout (Havertz and Woltemade) and sealed the 4-3 that toppled the favorites. In the Round of 16, he held off France for more than an hour in front of a very determined Paraguay, until being beaten by Mbappé in the 70th. The 1-0 ended La Albirroja's journey.
## Numbers
5 GP · Paraguay eliminated in the Round of 16 (0-1 to France, Mbappé goal in the 70th). Gill was the hero of the Round of 32, with 2 penalties saved against Germany. The end of a historic campaign.
